description:
Parent epic: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions

Source task 2/10 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify instructions and characters use one coherent "agent voice" story.

Epic closure criteria:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Added coverage for the coherent agent voice story: runtime character overrides replace compile-time persona text while preserving the agent instructions layer. Existing tests cover static, module, and MFA instructions plus compile-time characters. Verified format, compile --warnings-as-errors, and full mix test.

title: E2: Verify instructions and characters use one coherent "agent voice" story
